primaryItems.label: Master CCTV footage
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Master CCTV footage (see MG6C/CCTV/02) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Master footage/export needed — stills alone are not the full recording.

primaryItems.label: Full CCTV export
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Full CCTV export (see MG6C/CCTV/03) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Master footage/export needed — stills alone are not the full recording.

primaryItems.label: CCTV Continuity / provenance
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide CCTV Continuity / provenance (see MG6C/CCTV/04) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Continuity to master recording not confirmed on current papers.

primaryItems.label: audit trail
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide audit trail (see MG6C/CCTV/05) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Outstanding on current disclosure — chase before fixing hearing position.

safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that CCTV still images are served but master CCTV footage and continuity/provenance remain outstanding.
